title: Examples; Or, Like Prince, Like People.
content:
Examples lead us, and we likely see;
    Such as the prince is, will his people be.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Examples; Or, Like Prince, Like People."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
